title: pilosella lydiae
intro: Pilosella lydiae, also known as the false oxeye daisy, is a perennial flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone content. The health benefits of Pilosella lydiae include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and exhibiting potential antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Pilosella lydiae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
